# Golden IF-1/IF-2 wire message corpus — MANIFEST (Issue #68)
#
# Generated by meridian-proto-conformance --update. DO NOT hand-edit the
# .bin files. Each entry is the FlatBuffer ROOT-TABLE bytes for one wire
# message, encoded by the real meridian::proto codec (flatc-generated
# Create*). The transport-added framing (u32 LE length for IF-1; u16
# opcode + u64 seq for IF-2) is NOT part of these bytes — see
# conformance/conformance.cpp header.
#
# Columns: file | interface | opcode | size(bytes) | summary
#          then the full hex of the golden bytes.
#
# Regenerate:  cmake --build <build> --target meridian-proto-conformance
#              ./<build>/.../meridian-proto-conformance --update
# A golden change IS a wire-protocol change — review + commit both.

if1_client_hello.bin | IF-1 | - | 24 | C->S first frame: build + proto_ver
  hex: 0c00000008000c00080006000800000000000001dbea0000
if1_server_hello.bin | IF-1 | - | 24 | S->C hello ack: server build + proto_ver
  hex: 0c00000008000c00080006000800000000000001dbea0000
if1_srp_start.bin | IF-1 | - | 40 | C->S begin SRP for an account
  hex: 0c000000000006000800040006000000040000000f0000006d6572696469616e2e74657374657200
if1_srp_challenge.bin | IF-1 | - | 80 | S->C salt + public ephemeral B
  hex: 0c00000008000c0004000800080000002c0000000400000020000000202122232425262728292a2b2c2d2e2f303132333435363738393a3b3c3d3e3f10000000101112131415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f

  hex: 0c00000008000c0004000800080000001c0000000400000010000000606162636465666768696a6b6c6d6e6f20000000404142434445464748494a4b4c4d4e4f505152535455565758595a5b5c5d5e5f

  hex: 0c00000008000c000700080008000000000000010400000010000000707172737475767778797a7b7c7d7e7f

  hex:

  hex: 140000000000000000000a0018000c00040008000a00000014000000983a00000df0fecaefbeadde000000002000000000112233445566778899aabbccddeeff0f1e2d3c4b5a69788796a5b4c3d2e1f0

  hex:
